description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding storage cabinet or shelf unit with a clean, modern design. The front features six open compartments: two rows of three, with the central vertical section being slightly wider and taller than the side sections. The top surface is flat and extends slightly beyond the body, providing additional space for placing items. The sides and back are solid panels with no visible openings or features. The entire object is finished in a uniform light gray color, giving it a minimalist and versatile appearance suitable for urban environments such as offices, garages, or public waiting areas.
description: A modern, light gray rectangular cabinet or shelf with six open compartments and a flat top, designed for versatile storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing six open compartments arranged in two rows, with a flat top surface.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid, featureless panel and the depth of the unit.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid back panel with no openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, showing a solid panel.
